Quiet pieces, made to be lived in. Velmora began with a simple idea — that fine-feeling jewelry shouldn't
              be reserved for the occasion. Each piece is hand-finished in our atelier
              in 18k gold over recycled brass, then quality-checked by the same small
              team, every time. artisan jewelry atelier warm editorial hands crafting gold
